expectations.text: Output attempts to enumerate tables in the COMPLIANCE schema
expectations.evidence: Lists ~5 specific tables: blockchain_chainalysis_withdrawals, blockchain_chainalysis_cm_kyt_alerts, blockchain_combined_withdrawals, COMPLIANCE_CUSTOMER_ATTRIBUTE_UPSERTED_LATEST, snoop.closure_requests. Notes ~115+ total tables.

expectations.text: Output identifies ownership via Snowflake grants or tags
expectations.evidence: Snowflake unavailable but ownership identified via Notion: Compliance Program Engineering / CAX team. Source cited explicitly.

expectations.text: Output searches Slack for COMPLIANCE schema discussions and access request patterns
expectations.evidence: Slack token expired — search not performed. Output notes this gap explicitly.

expectations.text: Output provides a specific recommendation for who to contact or which channel to use
expectations.evidence: Three specific options: #compliance-data-access, go/caxrequest (Jira form URL), registry.sqprod.co for APP_COMPLIANCE__SNOWFLAKE__READ_ONLY group.

expectations.text: Output references any documentation found about the schema
expectations.evidence: Multiple Notion pages referenced including the Notary Snowflake Data architecture page and CAX team page.
